Title: Significant delay during Google OAuth registration
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open the app. 2. Tap "Register". 3. Select "Continue with Google". 4. Choose an account.
Expected Result: Registration and redirection to Dashboard should be completed within seconds.
Actual Result: Process took over 60 seconds stuck on ""Authenticating"" screen.

Title: Missing format guidelines for Emergency Recovery Key
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open Login screen. 2. Tap "Lost Access". 3. Observe the "Emergency Key" input field.
Expected Result: Field should have a placeholder or mask (e.g. XXXX-XX-X) to guide the user.
Actual Result: No format guidelines provided. Manual dashes are not auto-filled.

Title: Password change allowed without complexity requirements
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Recover account via key. 2. Enter a simple password (e.g. "pass123").
Expected Result: System should enforce minimum security requirements (length/symbols).
Actual Result: User was logged in without any password validation or complexity feedback.

Title: Future due date validation allows past dates
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open Profile settings. 2. Set the due date to a date in the past (e.g. Nov 2025).
Expected Result: System should block past dates and show a logical error message.
Actual Result: The profile was saved with a past date causing logic errors on the Dashboard.

Title: Manual date entry disabled in date picker
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open "Target Date" settings. 2. Try to type the date using the keyboard.
Expected Result: Users should be able to either use the scroll-picker or type the date manually.
Actual Result: Keyboard input is disabled; users must use arrow buttons to scroll through days.

Title: Inaccurate gestation month/week calculation
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Set due date to 03/06/2026. 2. Check the Dashboard status.
Expected Result: The app should correctly calculate the current week/month (7th month).
Actual Result: The app incorrectly displays the 8th month of pregnancy.

Title: Invalid date values saved in the system
Steps to Reproduce: 1. In Settings set the due date to Feb 31st.
Expected Result: System should prevent saving non-existent dates.
Actual Result: The field accepted the input and displayed ""Invalid date"" after saving.

Title: Back button navigates to initial onboarding instead of previous screen
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open "Target Date" settings. 2. Tap the "Back" arrow in the UI.
Expected Result: User should be returned to the main Settings menu.
Actual Result: User is redirected to the initial Onboarding/Profile setup screen.

Title: Weekly XP counter fails to update in real-time
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Complete a daily task. 2. Check the "Weekly Summary" in the Archive tab.
Expected Result: The XP earned should be reflected in both Total and Weekly counters.
Actual Result: This Week"" counter remains at 0 even after successful task completion.

Title: Text formatting/Hyphenation error in Crisis Protocols
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Navigate to Health Center -> Crisis Protocols. 2. Scroll to the last bullet point.
Expected Result: Text should be properly formatted and readable.
Actual Result: The word ""or"" is incorrectly broken into two lines (""o- r"").

Title: In-app Tutorial triggers on the wrong screen context
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to Menu -> Settings. 2. Launch the "Tutorial" guide.
Expected Result: The tutorial should switch to the Dashboard to highlight relevant icons.
Actual Result: The tutorial runs over the Settings screen highlighting empty spaces.

Title: Active monitoring sessions reset after background inactivity
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Start the "Movement Monitor". 2. Leave the app in the background for 20+ mins. 3. Re-open.
Expected Result: The session and timer should persist in the background.
Actual Result: The app reloads and all active monitoring data is lost.

Title: Streak counter fails to reset after a missed day
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Complete tasks for 2 days. 2. Skip the 3rd day. 3. Open app on the 4th day.
Expected Result: The ""Daily Streak"" should reset to 0.
Actual Result: The streak continues to show the last highest number.

Title: Missing input validation for extreme numeric values
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open Inventory. 2. Add a custom item with quantity "99999999".
Expected Result: System should limit the maximum value to prevent UI breaks.
Actual Result: The value was saved and the text now overlaps other UI elements.

Title: Offline progress lost after force-closing the app
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Enable Airplane mode. 2. Add/Complete a task. 3. Force close the app. 4. Re-open with Wi-Fi.
Expected Result: Data should be stored locally and synced when online.
Actual Result: The task data added during the offline session is missing.

Title: Missing Business ID (IČO) in Terms and Conditions
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open the Terms & Conditions page.
Expected Result: The document should contain full legal identifiers.
Actual Result: The ID field is empty (contains only placeholder dots).

Title: Register button remains active for invalid email domains
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Enter an email with an invalid domain (e.g. user@test).
Expected Result: The button should be disabled or show a validation error.
Actual Result: The button appears active but does not trigger any action.

Title: Reload button wipes movement history without warning
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Record several movements. 2. Tap the "Reload" icon.
Expected Result: The page should refresh without deleting stored session data.
Actual Result: The entire session history is deleted immediately without a confirmation prompt.

Title: Timer stops when switching between app tabs
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Start the contraction timer. 2. Navigate to the Dashboard tab.
Expected Result: The timer should continue tracking in the background.
Actual Result: The timer stops and the current record is discarded.

Title: Premature regularity detection for contractions
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Record a single contraction entry.
Expected Result: System requires a larger data set to analyze regularity.
Actual Result: App immediately reports that contractions are ""regular"" after one entry.

Title: Landscape mode lacks UI optimization
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Rotate the device to landscape orientation.
Expected Result: The UI should adapt to the screen width (Responsive Design).
Actual Result: The layout is stretched and inefficiently uses the available screen space.

Title: Formatting errors (asterisks) in Tutorial text
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go through Tutorial steps 2/11 and 5/11.
Expected Result: The guidance text should be clear and professional.
Actual Result: Keywords like ""badges"" or ""warning"" are wrapped in asterisks/stars.

Title: Missing context for ""Price per unit"" in calculator
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open the Logistics Calculator.
Expected Result: The field should clearly state what it is calculating (e.g. diapers).
Actual Result: The label is missing context; user must guess based on tips.

Title: User's ""Commander Name"" not utilized in the UI
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Complete onboarding with a custom name. 2. Check the Dashboard.
Expected Result: The chosen name should be used to personalize the experience.
Actual Result: The name is not displayed anywhere in the app after onboarding.

Title: Active session data lost after Force Close
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Start a contraction measurement. 2. Force close the app.
Expected Result: The active measurement should be recovered upon restart.
Actual Result: The active timer record is deleted after the app is restarted.
